features.description: Base RBAC capability. Always on — the app is unusable without it.
Tenant admins can create custom roles beyond the system-shipped set.

Tenant admins can create NEW permission strings (not just attach existing ones). Requires custom permission-aware domain code — usually reserved for enterprise tenants that self-serve their integrations.
Role grants can carry expires_at. Powers the delegation module's OOF flow + supports 'temporary elevated access' patterns.
CSV bulk-assign endpoint. Useful for onboarding a full staff cohort at once.
Extended audit retention on RBAC mutations — up to 7 years. Complements the audit module's own retention extension.
